notes: All 7 declarations are sorry-free (axiom-clean); the file is a leaf with no importers of its own — all results are consumed by SeparableScaling.lean, FrobeniusGalois.lean, HfactLemma.lean, DetDeg.lean, HasseAssembly.lean etc. The `weilPairing_adjoint_core` theorem (37-line proof) is the central reusable engine for the adjoint and scaling, consumed 6+ times across the project. The `weilPairing_scaling` result inherits a transitive `sorryAx` from `weilPairing_mul_right` (slot-2 bilinearity, upstream in DivisorPullback), but no sorry originates in this file.
